title: Mayor Owens Announces Homeowner Renovation Program
summary: Mayor Owens launched the Homeowner Renovation Program, a conditional-grant initiative administered by Syracuse Housing Strategies Corporation (SHSC) to provide 40-60% reimbursement (up to $90,000) for eligible home improvements in Far Westside, Tipperary Hill, and Salt Springs neighborhoods. Grants are forgiven if homeowners remain in their homes for 5-10 years; otherwise, a prorated portion must be repaid. The program includes application support, home inspections, and multiple community informational sessions.

political_signal.description: Mayor signals housing stability and neighborhood revitalization as core city priorities; frames program as wealth-building and community resilience strategy; heavy community engagement planned.

processing_notes: SHSC appears to be the administering entity but canonical department name requires validation
